509 O0400A1_SPCH_THRPY_IND_MIN_NUM O0400A1_SPCH_THRPY_IND_MIN_NUM O0400A1 Speech Therapy/Audiology Individual Minutes Number CHAR 4 The data in this column indicates the total number of minutes that speech-language pathology and audiology services were administered to the resident individually in the last seven days. discontinued 09/30/2025
